description: A panel discussion on MEV (Miner Extractable Value) and its implications for blockchain evolution, featuring insights from industry experts on tactics to manage MEV across L1s and L2s.
topic_summary: The panel explores the challenges and strategies related to MEV, discussing the effectiveness of various approaches by L1s and L2s to mitigate its impact, including transaction ordering and auction mechanisms [t=3:76-398:78].
